title: Transaction
description: A blockchain transaction on an EVM-compatible chain.

transaction_hash.description: The unique transaction hash (32-byte hex string prefixed with 0x).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the block that included this transaction.

to_address.description: The recipient's address, or null for contract creation transactions.

value.description: Native token value transferred in wei (as a string to preserve precision).

gas_used.description: Actual gas units consumed by this transaction.

gas_limit.description: Maximum gas units the sender was willing to pay.

method_id.description: First 4 bytes of call data (hex) identifying the called contract method.

nonce.description: Sender's transaction count at time of inclusion.
